content:
Tired of spinning up a Node server or wrestling with PHP just to make your static site's "Contact Me" form work?

I built CodeFreeForm to fix exactly that. It's a completely free, serverless API that routes form submissions directly to your inbox.

Why developers love it:

🚀 Zero Signup: No accounts or dashboards. Just enter your email and get an access key.

🔒 100% Private: We don't store your data. Submissions act as a strict passthrough to your email.

💻 Framework Agnostic: Works with a plain HTML
or JSON for React/Vue/Angular.

🛡️ Spam Protection: Lock your keys to specific domains.

Skip the backend boilerplate on your next portfolio or landing page. Get your free key in seconds and get back to building the fun stuff!

👉 Try it here: CodeFreeForm.com
